title: Luscious Turkish Nectarines Toast
description: A resinous, molten toast topped with sweet nectarines, feta, and a runny egg, finished with honey, sumac, and mint for a bold Turkish twist.
instructions: Preheat a nonstick skillet over medium heat.
Brush both sides of each bread slice with melted butter and place in the skillet until golden brown on both sides.
While the bread is toasting, slice the nectarines into thin rounds and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk the egg with a pinch of salt until blended.
When the toast is golden, remove it from the skillet and spread crumbled feta evenly over the hot surface.
Arrange nectarine slices on each toast, drizzle honey, sprinkle sumac, and scatter chopped mint over the fruit.
Pour the whisked egg over the fruit and cook until the egg whites are set and the edges lightly brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Drizzle a small amount of olive oil over the finished toast, then serve immediately while still warm.
